import cadquery as cq

# Engagement ring with oval center stone and pavé band
# Ring band dimensions

band_inner_radius = 8.5
band_height = 2
band_width = 1.5

# Create ring band
result = (Workplane("XY")
    .circle(band_outer_radius)
    .circle(band_inner_radius)
    .extrude(band_height)
)
